title: Marking Making/ Arbitrage Bot PolyMarket
author: Quethewiseguy
selftext:
I run one of the larger bots on polymarket for the BTC/ETH 15 min binary UP/DOWN 15 min/ 1 HR windows.

I am curious if anyone is doing something similar, and if so, how you went about trying to multi account? When I try to run the script on another account, a lot of the times I just end up buying/selling to myself, which is wash trading/ volume farming territory for poly market (can get your account suspended).

comments.author: Firefighter513
comments.body: I think you should consider looking into cross market arbitrage. It’s easier to do since those opportunities close less quickly.. look into what Predictionhunt.com does

comments.author: vprogids
comments.body: Yeah through comparing binary options prices for certain strike prices
